outcome: Investigator-attributed drug-related serious adverse event within 0-7 days
risk_of_bias_reason: Functional unblinding, subjective investigator attribution, and reporting windows not designed around this exact estimand.
inconsistency_reason: Both studies observed zero events; between-study heterogeneity cannot be meaningfully estimated.
indirectness_reason: Dose, diagnosis, active comparator, and highly supported clinical setting closely match the fixed scenario.
imprecision_reason: Only 67 exposed participants; exact 95% upper limit is 53.6 per 1,000 and the information size is far below thresholds for ruling out uncommon serious harm.
release_rule: May report observed count and interval with major-imprecision warning; may not claim zero risk, safety equivalence, or recreational generalizability.
